race.comment: Tough. MILES 'N' MILES (7) ran a much better race beaten 2.2 lengths over 2020m at Hobart. His easy win this track and trip four back reads well for this and he'd go close finding that form. JOHNNIE PINCH (2) is free running and lifted strongly to score by 2.5 lengths three runs back at this track before filling a minor placing at his last two starts. Is sure to play a big role. IFFYCOULD (6) tackled 2400m in the G3 Hobart Cup 17 days ago and he didn't get warm as expected. Missed 1L this track/trip prior and he draws handier today with Newitt reunited. Will hit the line and can't be underestimated. VINO NOVELLO (4) was tracking well before the latest when he was stepping up in trip. Raced favourite in that and with a 2kg claim is a chance. ZURICH (5) was a tidy winner two ago this track/trip and he settled too far back at Hobart last time. Needs a good ride but the 3kg claim brings him into it at a price.
